messages.content: Please translate below Chinese words in English: 你了解貓山王嗎？來自彭亨州貓山王的自傳! 我來自馬來西亞盛產榴槤的地方-彭亨州，我的家庭成員都生長在自家果園超過20年樹齡的榴槤樹上，我們每餐都食用有機肥料，個個也都健健康康！

Do you know Musang King? It is an autobiography from Musang King in Pahang state! I come from Pahang, Malaysia, which is known for its abundance of durians. My family members have all grown up on durian trees in our own orchard for over 20 years. We eat meals with organic fertilizers and we are all healthy!

當我們完全熟透後，每日新鮮從樹上自然跌落，第二日再送到你府上。
每個都香甜味美，建議立即食用最佳

When the durians are fully ripe, they naturally fall from the tree fresh every day and are delivered to your home the following day. Each one is fragrant and delicious. It is recommended to consume them immediately for the best taste.
我的特色

My uniqueness is that I come from a family with a long history of durian cultivation. We have been growing durians in our own orchard for over 20 years. We prioritize organic fertilizers and take care of our trees, resulting in healthy and high-quality durians. Our durians are known for their rich and enticing aroma, as well as their sweet and delicious taste.
馬來西亞有多個地方種植貓山王，以彭亨州最為著名
In Malaysia, Musang King durians are grown in several regions, but the state of Pahang is the most famous for it.
貓山王特徵是底部有五角星形，代表有五瓣果肉
The characteristic feature of Musang King durians is that they have a pentagonal star-shaped bottom, which represents the existence of five segments of flesh inside.

果肉嫩滑，顏色呈深黃色，
入口有層次感，吃後回味甘
The flesh of Musang King durians is creamy and smooth, with a deep yellow color. It has a layered texture when you bite into it, and leaves a sweet aftertaste.
高海拔的殼是啡色，味道較濃郁；低海拔的殼是青色，味道較清甜

The shells of Musang King durians grown at higher altitudes are brown in color and have a more intense flavor. On the other hand, durians grown at lower altitudes have green shells and a sweeter taste.
訂購1箱/5個可免費送貨( ~10kg)
Ordering one box of Musang King durians, which contains five durians, will qualify for free delivery, with a weight of approximately 10kg.
以當日價格為準
The price for the Musang King durians will be based on the current day's price.
接受大量訂購，價格可另議
We accept bulk orders of Musang King durians, and the price can be negotiated separately.
B果參考價格 以當日價格為準
The reference price for Musang King durians is subject to change based on the current day's price.
寄送到國內的為冷凍 A/AA級果
The durians that are shipped domestically and classified as A/AA grade will be delivered in a frozen state.
help me create a website about selling durian

Certainly! Here's a basic outline for creating a website about selling durians:

1. Homepage: Provide an attractive introduction to your website and showcase the highlights of your durians, such as unique varieties and their exceptional quality.

2. About Us: Share the story of your durian business, including your passion, family history, and commitment to delivering the best durians to customers.

3. Durian Products: Create dedicated pages or sections to showcase the different varieties of durians you offer, along with photos, descriptions, and pricing details. 

4. Ordering and Delivery: Explain how customers can place orders, whether through an online form, phone call, or other means. Provide information on delivery options, including areas served and any shipping charges.

5. Durian Knowledge: Educate your website visitors on various aspects of durians, including tips on selecting, storing, and enjoying them. Share interesting facts about the different durian varieties and their flavor profiles.

6. Testimonials: Display customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and show the satisfaction of previous buyers.

7. FAQ: Address common questions and concerns about purchasing durians, such as how to deal with issues like ripeness, handling, and refunds.

8. Blog or News Section: Regularly update your website with informative articles, recipes, news about durians, and any promotions or events you may have.

9. Contact Us: Provide contact information, including phone numbers, email addresses, and social media profiles, so customers can easily get in touch with inquiries or feedback.

10. Online Store: Optionally, consider integrating an e-commerce platform so that customers can directly purchase durians from your website.

Remember to design your website to be visually appealing, mobile-friendly, and easy to navigate. Use high-quality images that showcase the beauty and quality of your durians, and optimize the content for search engines to improve visibility online.
help me create a website about selling durian

Certainly! Here's a step-by-step guide to help you create a website for selling durians:

1. Choose a domain name: Select a domain name that is relevant and easy to remember, such as "durianparadise.com" or "premiumdurians.com". You can register a domain from various domain registration websites.

2. Choose a website platform: Select a user-friendly platform to build your website, such as WordPress, Wix, or Shopify. These platforms offer templates and tools to help you create a professional-looking site without coding skills.

3. Design and layout: Choose a visually appealing theme or template that aligns with the identity of your durian business. Customize the colors, fonts, and layout to make it unique. Ensure that the website is responsive, meaning it looks good on both desktop and mobile devices.

4. About us: Create an "About Us" page to tell the story of your durian business. Describe your passion for durians, the history of your business, and what makes your durians special. Include any certifications or awards you have received.

5. Durian products: Create dedicated pages for each durian variety you offer. Include high-quality images, detailed descriptions, and pricing information. You can also provide information about the taste, texture, and aroma of each durian variety.

6. Online ordering: Set up an online ordering system that allows customers to select the desired durians and place orders. Include an easy-to-use shopping cart and payment options such as credit cards, PayPal, or online banking.

7. Delivery and shipping: Provide clear information about the delivery areas you serve and any associated charges. Explain packaging methods to ensure durians arrive in good condition. If you offer international shipping, specify the locations and associated fees.

8. Testimonials and reviews: Showcase customer testimonials and reviews to build trust and credibility. Include feedback from satisfied customers to enhance your reputation.

9. Durian education: Add a section that educates visitors about durians. Provide information about the different durian varieties, how to choose ripe durians, storage tips, and durian recipes.

10. Contact information: Make it easy for customers to get in touch with you. Include contact details such as phone numbers, email addresses, and social media links. Consider adding a contact form for inquiries or feedback.

11. Promotions and newsletters: Offer promotions or discounts on your website to attract customers. Additionally, provide an option for visitors to subscribe to your newsletter to receive updates on new durian arrivals, promotions, or events.

12. SEO and marketing: Optimize your website for search engines by using relevant keywords, meta tags, and descriptive URLs. Implement digital marketing strategies such as social media marketing, content marketing, and search engine advertising to drive traffic to your website.

Remember to regularly update your website with fresh content, respond to customer inquiries promptly, and maintain a professional online presence. Good luck with your durian business website!
